mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bdgl_file_borrow_record (file_number, borrow_id, loan_time, return_time) VALUES
( #{item.fileNumber}, #{item.borrowId}, #{item.loanTime}, #{item.returnTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, file_number, borrow_id, loan_time, return_time FROM bdgl_file_borrow_record WHERE file_number = #{fileNumber} ORDER BY loan_time ASC
